sdapi_pages.title: Sports DataAmerican Football API - Coverage Tiers and Types
headings: Sports DataAmerican Football API - Coverage Tiers and Types
tables: Delivers the point scoring player names per match (including game minute and seconds) for scoring types TD (Touchdown),
Delivers player stats for Passing, Rushing, Receiving, Defense and Special Teams stats
Delivers team stats: Total Team 1st Downs, Total 1st Downs by Rushing, Total 1st Downs by Passing, Total 1st Downs by Pe
Enhanced play by play information on a team and player level
Score and Time updated every 8 minutes

sdapi_pages.title: Sports DataAmerican Football API Index and User Guide
headings: Sports DataAmerican Football API Index and User Guide
tables: https is the default request type
Request domain to access the Sports Data API. For most clients, this is the default: api.performfeeds.com Use the defaul
Resource of the Sports Data API. In this case, the Football API: footballdata
Feed name of the resource in the Football API. For example: squads
Outlet Authentication Key . A unique 26-character alphanumeric UUID which is unique to each outlet. Any requests made wi
Query parameters . There are required and optional parameters. Optional parameters can help you to search the feed and c
Tournament Calendars (OT2) Tournament Calendars (OT2) Get basic information about the tournament calendars - the individ
Tournament Schedule (MA0) Tournament Schedule (MA0) Get schedule information for a tournament, including individual matc
Match (MA1) Match (MA1) Get details of a match or matches, such as date, start time, contestants, competition, season, v
Match Statistics (MA2) Match Statistics (MA2) Get detailed match statistics for teams and each of the individual players
Match Events (MA3) Match Events (MA3) Get all events in a game, including team, event, type, timestamp, and qualifiers,
Go For Two Predictions (MA4) Go For Two Predictions (MA4) Get ‘Go For Two’ predictions during a live American Football m
Fourth Down Predictions (MA5) Fourth Down Predictions (MA5) Get ‘Fourth Down’ predictions during a live American Footbal

coverage_tiers.title: Sports Data American Football API - Coverage Tiers and Types

coverage_types.Scorers: Delivers point scoring player names per match (game minute and seconds) for TD (Touchdown), FG (Field Goal), EP (Extra Points), 2pt Conv (Two-point conversion), Safety (Defensive 2 points)
coverage_types.Player Stats: Delivers player stats for Passing, Rushing, Receiving, Defense and Special Teams
coverage_types.Team Stats: Total Team 1st Downs, 1st Downs by Rushing/Passing/Penalty, 3rd/4th Down Conversions and Attempts, Total Offensive Yards/Plays, Rushing Yards/Attempts, Passing Yards (Gross), Times Sacked. Note: college football will not have all team stats.
coverage_types.X-Info: Enhanced play by play information on a team and player level
coverage_types.Player Participation: Description of each player on the field for each play
coverage_types.Basic Positioning & Roles: Each specific position a player was playing on a given play and their role (Pass Rush, Coverage)
coverage_types.Advanced Positioning & Roles: Advanced description including Pass Rush, Coverage, Route Run, Gap Rushed, Type of Coverage

5.name: Event Data
5.description: Live Score — Score and Time updated every 8 minutes

6.name: Event Data
6.description: Live Score — Score and Time updated every 8 minutes. Post-game team & player stats.

7.name: Event Data
7.description: Live Scores & Basic Events — Live scores & scoring summary. Post-game team & player stats.

11.name: Live Play-by-Play Advanced Postgame Data
11.description: Live play by play. Live offensive team & player stats. Live team & player stats on Sacks and Interceptions. Full post-game team and player stats. Full post-game X-Info, Player Participation, Basic Positioning & Roles.

12.name: Live Play-by-Play Advanced Postgame Data
12.description: Live play by play. Live offensive and defensive team & player stats. Full post-game team and player stats. Full post-game X-Info, Player Participation, Advanced Positioning & Roles.
